channel.title: RNN on Sukai Huang
channel.description: Recent content in RNN on Sukai Huang

item.title: Tao_lei When Attention Meets Fast Recurrence Training Language Models With Reduced Compute 2021
item.description: [TOC] Title: When Attention Meets Fast Recurrence: Training Language Models with Reduce Compute Author: Tao Lei Publish Year: Sep 2021 Review Date: Jan 2022 Summary of paper As the author mentioned, the inspiration of SRU++ comes from two lines of research: paralleization / speed problem of Original RNN leveraging recurrence in conjunction with self-attention Structure of SRU++ New discovery :little attention is needed given recurrence.
